entities.name: WATER MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Strategies and practices for the efficient use and allocation of water resources in agriculture

entities.name: ALLOCATION POLICIES
entities.description: Regulatory frameworks and guidelines for distributing water among different users and sectors

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL INTENSIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing agricultural productivity per unit of land

entities.name: AGRO-ECOLOGICAL ZONES
entities.description: Geographic areas defined by common environmental, climatic, and soil characteristics

entities.name: HYDROLOGIC BASINS
entities.description: Land areas that drain into a common water body, such as a river or lake

entities.name: RESILIENT AGRARIAN COMMUNITIES
entities.description: Farming-based societies capable of absorbing shocks and maintaining productivity

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The region of the African continent located south of the Sahara Desert

entities.name: RAINFED CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: Agricultural systems that rely exclusively on precipitation for water supply

entities.name: TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Technical tools, equipment, and scientific methods used to improve agricultural outcomes

entities.name: INSTITUTIONS
entities.description: Formal and informal rules, organizations, and social structures that govern agricultural behavior

entities.name: CHALLENGE PROGRAM ON WATER AND FOOD
entities.description: A specific research initiative focused on addressing water and food security issues

entities.name: BASIN DEVELOPMENT CHALLENGES
entities.description: Research-focused problems related to the sustainable development of river basins

entities.name: TECHNICAL AND INSTITUTIONAL INNOVATIONS
entities.description: New technical methods and organizational changes applied to water management

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMERS
entities.description: Farmers who manage small parcels of land, often for subsistence or local markets
